onderwerp: Welcome to Petrol – Your journey starts here
preheader: We're excited to welcome you as part of our growing family.
titel: WELCOME TO PETROL – YOUR JOURNEY STARTS HERE
intro_2: We're excited to welcome you as part of our growing family. This email contains everything you need to get started with our brand and access our tools.
klantnummer_tekst: We have created a customer number for you:
klantnummer_na: Please include this number in all future correspondence, as it will help us assist you more efficiently.
b2b_intro_1: In a few minutes, you will receive an email from Colect with instructions to create your B2B account. Please follow the steps in that email to complete your registration. Please also check your spam folder.
b2b_intro_2: Our B2B portal is the central place where you can easily place orders and manage your account.
inloggen_kop: Log in for the first time
inloggen_stappen: Enter your email address (this is your username)
You will receive an email with your password
instellingen_intro: After logging in, you can easily use the settings menu to:
support_tekst: If you have any questions or need assistance, our team is always ready to help.
movie_tekst: Discover the story behind Petrol and get inspired by our brand movie.
afsluiting: We are excited to start this collaboration and look forward to achieving great results together.
